title: Trump: only lift sanctions if Iran 'behaves' after deal; won't unfreeze assets before deal done; Bessent redirect plan continues
snippet: Trump stated the US will only lift sanctions on Iran if 'they behave' after a peace deal is signed. He won't unfreeze Iran's assets before the deal is completed. Treasury Secretary Bessent's frozen asset redirect plan to Gulf allies for reconstruction continues. This represents Trump's negotiating stance of maintaining maximum leverage through sanctions even as he claims a deal is 'very close.' Sources: The Hill, Express Tribune, Fortune, Kyiv Post, TBS.
tag_reason: Update on frozen assets/sanctions posture from previous day's Bessent redirect plan reporting; new Trump conditions added

entities.name: US Treasury Frozen Assets Redirect Plan
